summary: BTC Tools | Schedule | Verify Top Navigation
gherkin:
When the user visits the Operator tool and logs in
Then the user should be successfully logged into the platform
When the user clicks on the BTC Tools page
And the user navigates to the "BTC Tools" page at the top Nav
And the user clicks on the "<title>" option on the top nav
Then the browser url should contain "<partial_url>"Examples:
|*title*|*partial_url*|
|Schedule|/btc-tools/schedule|
|Pipeline Configs|/btc-tools/pipeline-configs|
|Pipeline Input Configs|/btc-tools/pipeline-input-configs|
|Multicast Mapping|/btc-tools/multicast-mappings|
|CDN Status|/btc-tools/cdn-status|
|Broadcast Source Overrides|/btc-tools/broadcast-source-overrides|
|Team Zixi Sources|/btc-tools/team-zixi-sources|
